name: Florentine Chicken (Pollo Alla Fiorentina)
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 14 to 16 small pieces or ask a butcher to do so.
2. Wash and dry the pieces thoroughly. Place them in a large bowl.
3. Season with salt and pepper, sprinkle with parsley, add oil, and lemon juice; mix well.
4. Let stand for 2 to 3 hours.
5. Beat eggs with salt and pepper in a medium bowl.
6. Remove chicken from marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
7. Coat the chicken lightly with flour.
8. Dip into beaten eggs; let excess egg drip off.
9. Heat oil to 375F, or until a 1-inch cube of bread turns golden brown after 1 minute.
10. Fry chicken pieces for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden on all sides.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Place chicken pieces on a warm platter and sprinkle lightly with salt. Serve immediately.
